_meta.source: BIR Revenue Regulations No. 11-2018 (as amended by TRAIN Law) — Weekly Compensation Level (WCL) table, Annex E
_meta.authority: Republic Act No. 10963 (Tax Reform for Acceleration and Inclusion / TRAIN Law) — individual income tax brackets effective January 1, 2023 onwards (second phase of TRAIN rate reductions)
notes: Withholding tax is applied to TAXABLE INCOME, not gross compensation.
Bracket 'over' values are the LOWER exclusive bounds. At TI = bracket floor exactly, the worker stays in the previous bracket; math is continuous at boundaries.
Bracket bases (432.60, 1971.20, 7740.45, 42355.65) are the BIR-published weekly cumulative tax values (annual ÷ 52).
